01-project-scaffolding.title: Project Scaffolding — NestJS Monorepo + Prisma + Docker
01-project-scaffolding.notes: All scaffolding complete. Backend builds, tests pass (14/14). All 3 frontend apps build with Vite. Docker compose configured with postgres (pgvector), redis, minio, meilisearch, mailpit.

02-database-schema.title: Database Schema & Prisma Setup
02-database-schema.notes: Full Prisma schema with 11 models (AdminUser, Tenant, TenantUser, ClientUser, Role, Permission, RolePermission, UserRole, RefreshToken, SubscriptionPlan, TenantSubscription, AuditLog), 4 enums, PostgreSQL extensions (uuid-ossp, pgvector, pg_trgm). Idempotent seed with admin user, 3 subscription plans, CRUD permissions for 5 resources, and demo tenant. Build passes, all 14 tests pass.

03-configuration-management.title: Configuration & Environment Management
03-configuration-management.notes: Zod config schema with fail-fast validation, typed AppConfigService, AppConfigModule (global), .env.example with docs, .env.test for test overrides. 42 tests pass, build clean.

04-exception-handling.title: Exception Handling & Error Response Format
04-exception-handling.notes: ErrorCodes + ErrorCodeHttpStatus mapping, AppException extending HttpException, GlobalExceptionFilter (handles AppException/ZodError/HttpException/Prisma/unknown), ZodValidationPipe with field-level errors, ServiceResult.toHttpException(). 90 tests pass, build clean.

05-request-response-envelope.title: Request/Response Envelope & API Conventions
05-request-response-envelope.notes: TransformInterceptor wraps all responses in {success, data, timestamp, traceId} envelope. PaginatedResult class + paginate() utility for paginated responses with pagination metadata. Backend api-response.types.ts + frontend types already aligned. Registered globally in main.ts. 17 new tests (8 interceptor + 9 pagination), 107 total tests pass.

06-logging-infrastructure.title: Logging Infrastructure — Structured JSON, Tracing
06-logging-infrastructure.notes: Pino-based structured logger (JSON in prod, pretty in dev), RequestContext with AsyncLocalStorage, CorrelationIdMiddleware, RequestLoggingMiddleware. 148 tests pass, build clean.

07-multi-tenancy-middleware.title: Multi-Tenancy Middleware — Tenant Resolution
07-multi-tenancy-middleware.notes: TenantResolutionMiddleware resolves from subdomain/X-Tenant-ID/X-Tenant-Slug/JWT (priority order). TenantCacheService with 30s TTL (in-memory, swap to Redis in task 14). TenantScopeInterceptor auto-injects tenantId on write ops. CurrentTenant decorator. Skips admin/auth/health/docs routes. 190 total tests pass, build clean.

08-postgresql-rls.title: PostgreSQL Row-Level Security Policies
08-postgresql-rls.notes: RLS enabled on 6 tenant-scoped tables (tenant_users, roles, role_permissions, user_roles, audit_logs, tenant_subscriptions) with FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY. Policies use app.current_tenant_id session variable for tenant isolation and app.bypass_rls for admin bypass. Prisma extension (withRLS/withRLSBypass) wraps queries in transactions with SET LOCAL. PrismaService exposes .rls (auto from RequestContext), .rlsBypass (admin), and .forTenant(id) methods. 25 new tests (215 total), build clean.

09-authentication-system.title: Authentication — JWT + Refresh + 3 User Types
09-authentication-system.notes: Full auth system with 3 login flows (admin, tenant, client), client registration, JWT access tokens (15m) + refresh token rotation (7d, SHA-256 hashed, max 5 per user). @Public() decorator skips auth, @CurrentUser() extracts JWT payload. GET /me returns user profile with permissions for tenant users. JwtAuthGuard with TOKEN_EXPIRED vs UNAUTHORIZED distinction. 246 total tests pass, build clean.

10-rbac-permissions.title: RBAC & Permissions System
10-rbac-permissions.notes: Full RBAC system: @Roles() and @RequirePermission() decorators, RolesGuard with 30s in-memory permission cache, roles CRUD module with tenant scoping, manage wildcard permission, default system roles (OWNER/ADMIN/MANAGER/MEMBER) seeded per tenant, 20 permissions across 6 resources. 291 total tests pass, build clean.

11-subscription-plan-limits.title: Subscription & Plan Limit Enforcement
11-subscription-plan-limits.notes: Full subscriptions module: Admin CRUD for plans, tenant subscription management, per-tenant overrides. PlanLimitGuard with @PlanLimit() decorator enforces resource limits (users, storage). FeatureGateGuard with @FeatureGate() decorator enforces feature access. Usage counts cached with 60s TTL. Admin bypass for both guards. Seed data updated to match spec (Starter free/3 users, Professional $49/25 users, Enterprise $199/unlimited). 341 total tests pass, build clean.

12-query-parameters-filtering.title: Query Parameters — Filters, Sorting, Pagination, Includes
12-query-parameters-filtering.notes: QueryParameters DTO with types/interfaces, QueryParametersPipe (bracket-notation filter parsing, sort, pagination, includes with allowlists), buildPrismaQuery helper (maps all operators to Prisma where/orderBy/skip/take/include with auto soft-delete filter). 63 new tests (404 total), build clean.

13-rate-limiting.title: Rate Limiting — Redis Sliding Window
13-rate-limiting.notes: Redis sliding window rate limiting using ioredis sorted sets. RedisService (connection manager), RateLimitService (sliding window check with sorted sets), ThrottlerGuard (global APP_GUARD with multi-tier rate limiting), @Throttle() and @SkipThrottle() decorators. Tiers: per-IP (100/60s), auth endpoints (10/60s), upload endpoints (20/60s), per-tenant (1000/60s), per-user (300/60s). X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset headers on all responses, Retry-After on 429. Fail-open on Redis errors. X-Forwarded-For proxy support. 27 new tests (431 total), build clean.

14-caching-layer.title: Caching Layer — Redis, Tenant-Aware
14-caching-layer.notes: CacheService with tenant-aware keys (saas:{tenantId}:{namespace}:{key}), default 5min TTL, pattern-based invalidation via SCAN, getOrSet cache-aside pattern. @Cacheable and @CacheEvict decorators with custom keyGenerator support. Platform cache via _platform tenantId. All 452 tests pass, build clean.

23-ai-module.title: AI Module — Vercel AI SDK, Tools, Streaming
